title: iris pallida subsp. cengialti
intro: Iris pallida subsp. cengialti, also known as the Dalmatian iris, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the iris family that is native to the Dalmatian region in the Mediterranean. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating eye disorders and skin conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Iris pallida subsp. cengialti include its ability to soothe and calm irritated skin, as well as reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. Iris pallida subsp. cengialti is often used in herbal preparations, such as tinctures and infusions, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
